Dashboard Archive: 2026-06-25 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data reveals two extraordinarily strong long-term performers at the top of the rankings. AGX ranks #1 with a score of 96.0, showing consistent multi-year strength with 1,676.95% returns over 10 years and outperforming SPY by 1,423.49% over the same period, while maintaining clean momentum signals and normal volatility. ADTTF demonstrates even more extreme long-term performance with a staggering 10,017.7% 10-year return and 9,764.25% outperformance versus SPY, though its extreme 12.97x ratio between 10-year and 5-year returns suggests either a very recent acceleration or potential data anomalies worth investigating. Both securities pass all moving average filters (SMA 30/50/100/200) and show 4 out of 4 ratio passes, indicating sustained momentum across multiple timeframes rather than recent spikes. The correlation profiles show both tickers have modest positive correlation to materials and industrial sectors (IAU, XLI) while maintaining negative or near-zero correlation to defensive and financial sectors, suggesting they benefit from economically sensitive, growth-oriented market conditions.
